roi_scenarios.name: Conservative
risks: Unfavorable reviews on initial store launch
required_validation: Verify Stripe basic checkout functionality in test sandbox

roi_scenarios.name: Realistic
required_validation: Verify Stripe webhook signature check code
Audit public port exposures on billing servers

roi_scenarios.name: Strong
assumptions: Balanced Pro and Enterprise tier user distribution mix
risks: Scaling limits on local database read capacities
required_validation: Conduct stress load tests on webhook receivers
Verify double percent signs prevention in billing UI

roi_scenarios.name: Breakout
assumptions: Heavy enterprise subscription tier selection mix
risks: Substantial API token consumption billing costs
required_validation: Enforce strict rate limits on payment routes
Run full E2E Playwright test suite gates before deploy promotion

next_actions.title: Implement User Authentication System
next_actions.description: Set up secure sign-in, JWT session controls, and roles using Supabase Auth or native sessions.
